query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `webhook_configs_crm` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `user_id` int NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
  `url` text NOT NULL,
  `secret` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
  `events` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('active','paused','failed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  `max_retries` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 3,
  `retry_delay_seconds` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 300,
  `headers` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `last_triggered_at` bigint DEFAULT NULL,
  `failure_count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `created_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  `updated_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  CONSTRAINT `webhook_configs_crm_id` PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
);

  `failure_count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `created_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  `updated_at` bigint NOT NULL,

);
